name: LEC Engineering Ecosystem
summary: Canonical overview of LEC's internal software ecosystem: legacy SIS, Google Workspace/GAM, Firebase/GCP apps, Stripe fundraising, LEConnect messaging, short links, tracing, and AI ops tooling.
copy: Start here for the full map of LEC engineering. This overview connects the legacy SIS, Google Workspace management, fundraising, messaging, observability, and internal AI operations into one coherent system map.

name: LEC DB Knowledge
summary: Documentation-only knowledge base for the legacy LEC SIS schema and business rules, consumed by internal AI agents such as Bina and Golem.
copy: The institutional memory for the SIS. LEC DB Knowledge gives AI assistants and developers a reviewed map of core school data domains.

name: Fundraising Campaign Platform
summary: Public Stripe-based fundraising platform where admins create campaigns, donation pages, honor walls, progress bars, and live dashboards.
copy: A modern campaign platform for LEC fundraising, supporting one-time and monthly giving, campaign pages, honor-wall recognition, Stripe routing, and live dashboards.

name: LEC App Dashboard
summary: Internal staff and IT dashboard for LEConnect ecosystem usage, Firebase user management, cloud/on-prem server inventory, and Nylas scheduler tools.
copy: The operating dashboard for LEC's app ecosystem. Staff can review usage, manage users, inspect infrastructure, and support parent-teacher scheduling from one place.

name: GAM Management Frontend
summary: Next.js administrative console for managing Google Workspace users, devices, departments, classes, policies, and guided compliance decisions.
copy: A guided Google Workspace control center for LEC. Principals and IT staff can manage users, Chromebooks, classes, departments, and policies without touching GAM directly.

name: GAM Backend
summary: Core Google Workspace backend wrapping GAMADV-XTD3, Google Admin SDK, Classroom APIs, Calendar, Drive, Celery/Redis jobs, and Firestore logs.
copy: The service layer behind LEC Google Workspace automation. It centralizes credentials and exposes safe programmatic operations for users, devices, groups, Classroom, calendars, and Drive.

name: Teacher Workflows
summary: Teacher-facing certificate generator that reads class and student data from the legacy SIS and renders printable customized PDFs.
copy: A practical teacher tool for end-of-year recognition. Teachers sign in, select classes, customize certificate language, and generate polished PDFs.

name: LEConnect Messaging Dashboard
summary: Monitoring and control dashboard for LEConnect mass communication batches, delivery status, webhook logs, recipient search, resend, cancel, and sync actions.
copy: A command center for family communications. Staff can monitor batches, inspect delivery results, search recipients, review webhook logs, and coordinate resend or cancellation actions.

name: Attendance Notification Docs
summary: Documentation for the SQL Server attendance and absence-notification pipeline, including SendGrid transport and webhook tracking.
copy: The reference guide for LEC attendance notifications and the shared messaging transport conventions behind the scenes.

name: LEC Short URL
summary: Internal short-link and QR-code microservice with click tracking, batch templated links, destination checks, and webhook relay into Connect.
copy: LEC's shared short-link service creates branded, trackable links and QR codes while capturing click analytics and relaying events to legacy Connect systems.

name: LEC Tracing
summary: Internal observability dashboard for searching API and webhook traces, replaying requests, and minting scoped temporary trace links.
copy: A debugging cockpit for backend services, helping engineers inspect request history, search trace data, replay requests, and share scoped trace views.

name: Golem AI Ops Agent
summary: Internal AI ops/support agent with Claude Agent SDK, persistent memory, skills, scheduled jobs, GitHub context, Firebase, Mongo traces, and Redis workers.
copy: The meta-tool for operating LEC engineering. Golem helps engineers inspect logs, reason across services, maintain memory, use skills, and coordinate jobs.

name: LEC Postman
summary: Self-hosted internal Postman clone for creating, saving, and executing HTTP requests against LEC services with developer APIs.
copy: An internal API workbench for LEC developers and AI agents to run saved requests, manage environments, broker authenticated service calls, and test APIs.

name: Gradebook Wizard Integration
summary: Planned SIS-to-Gradebook Wizard automation for year-start class/roster setup and ongoing enrollment add/drop synchronization.
copy: A planned bridge between the LEC SIS and Gradebook Wizard to reduce manual setup by syncing classes, rosters, and enrollment changes.

name: G Suite Management Dashboard
summary: Google Workspace management project surfaced from GitHub; should be reviewed against the GAM frontend/backend stack.
copy: A Google Workspace management project in the LEC GitHub organization. Review against the GAM stack to determine whether it is historical, experimental, or current.

name: Tablet Enrollment
summary: Device-enrollment project candidate; needs README-derived details or GitHub metadata to clarify purpose and deployment status.
copy: A device-enrollment project candidate for the engineering portal. Add README-derived details to clarify its current purpose, audience, and deployment status.
